label: 62_ccps_ccp_clearing_central clearing
description: Discussions on central clearing's role in financial stability, focusing on the adequacy of margin requirements and loss-absorbing capacity. Key figures from the Federal Reserve and European Central Bank emphasized the importance of robust central counterparties in managing derivatives risk.
